programme.title: Brave To Love Again
programme.desc: Tian Xi dan Qi Bin pernah bercinta 10 tahun yang lalu, namun berpisah disebabkan Qi Bin mendapat penyakit hilang deria rasa dan bau selama-lamanya. Tian Xi tidak berpuas hati dan ingin menyambung kembali kisah percintaan mereka selepas mendapat tahu punca utama perpisahan mereka dahulu, tetapi Qi Bin mengelak. Lucy, ibu Tian Xi meyakinkan Tian Xi sekiranya kebahagiaan sudah tiba, beranilah bercinta semula sekali lagi.

programme.title: Kerana Hafsanya Setia
programme.desc: Ali ternampak Abang Syam di jalanraya. Abang Syam meracau-racau dan tidak tentu arah. Ali membawanya berjumpa Kak Jun. Kak Jun membawa Abang Syam pulang ke kampung untuk berubat. Ali mengharap Delilah masih menerima dirinya lagi. Wairah yang barubekerja di firma guaman Hud, telah di tegur Hud kerana tidak fokus pada kerja. Ibu Delilah, Faridah tidak suka Delilah berhubungan semula dengan Ali.

programme.title: A Match By Maid
programme.desc: Kisah pakatan huru-hara sekumpulan pembantu rumah daripada dua keluarga kelas atasan yang saling bermusuh sejak turun-temurun. Di sebalik permusuhan tradisi itu, kumpulan pembantu ini diupah dan bekerjasama demi menyatukan majikan masing-masing melalui sebuah ikatan cinta.

programme.title: Pendua
programme.desc: Kisah Izwan yang mengidap Skizofrenia mahu membalas dendam terhadap Amirul atas kesengsaraan yang terpaksa ditanggungnya. Izwan menipu Marlia, isteri kepada Amirul dengan menyatakan bahawa dia adalah tunang kepada kekasih gelap Amirul. Oleh sebabitu Izwan dan Marlia bersubahat untuk mengenakan Amirul dengan menculik anak Amirul dan meminta tebusan tanpa Marlia sedar bahawa sebenarnya, Izwan adalah abang kepada Amirul yang dibuang keluarga dan dia sebenarnya ingin membalas dendam terhadap suaminya itu.

programme.title: Tunggu Dulu Cinta
programme.desc: Episod kali ini mengenai Kamal ingin tahu siapa sebenarnya Khairi dan hubungannya dengan Aivy. Namun, pada masa yang sama Kamal masih tidak dapat melupakan Suraya. Achik pula membantu Siti di restoran. Aivy jatuh ke dalam kolam.

programme.title: Gadis Insta Masuk Dapur

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: Billy Batson, seorang remaja yatim piatu yang selalu melarikan diri dari keluarga angkat, dipilih oleh seorang ahli sihir kuno untuk menerima kuasa luar biasa. Dengan menyebut "Shazam", dia boleh berubah menjadi seorang adiwira dewasa yang memiliki pelbagai kuasa dewa. programme.title: Voyage Around a Volcano - A Train Trip to Italy's Mount Etna
programme.desc: For almost 120 years, the "Circumetnea” narrow-gauge railway has been circling Europe’s highest volcano. The train travels through impressive lava landscapes and vegetation zones, as well as two nature parks, with the UNESCO World Heritage Site of Mount Etna always in view.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from July 23, Day 12 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Nagoya.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: Young people, born into Kyoto-pottery families, aimed to radically rethink traditional ceramics and founded Sodeisha in 1948. The group's influence spread locally and abroad and continues to this day.

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Ishikawa Mao is an award-winning photographer who has been documenting the lives of people in Okinawa for 50 years. She talks about what she wants to express through her work.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programme.desc: Kiriboshi daikon-daikon radish that's cut and sun-dried to preserve it. Both tasty and nutritious, it's gaining traction as a health food. Discover more about its unique texture and versatility.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE: A Secret Date
programme.desc: It's late at night, when all are fast asleep. A young man and woman huddle together along the veranda outside of a house, attending to a ... rooster. What could the pair be up to?

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: With colorful pile fabric and comfortable knits, Wakayama prefecture is drawing global attention as a textile hub. We bring you striking images of its machines and the beat of its factories.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Summer #5
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka. Behold the sublime beauty of Mt. Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Deep dives into cultural phenomena with Peter Barakan, a bilingual British broadcaster based in Japan since 1974. Each time, Peter himself discovers something new about Japan.

programme.desc: A unique project along Tokyo's JR Ome Line is turning the area's empty homes into hotel rooms with one station currently acting as the front desk. See how tourism is revitalizing the community.

programme.desc: Introducing asari, Japan's most popular clam. Visit Aichi to feast your eyes on asari dishes and see how they're cultivated using suspended cages. How about diving for some giant asari?!

programme.title: Hit the Road 5minutes Saitama
programme.desc: Let's take a drive in Saitama and discover its natural beauty and hidden gems. From Omiya, we head to Chichibu to see its famed SL train. En route, we savor local dishes and try washi paper crafting.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE: Doodles or Ukiyoe
programme.desc: A series of doodles by the famous artist Utagawa Kuniyoshi turn out to be carefully considered depictions of the kabuki actors of the day. What kind of artistic statement was he trying to make?

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from July 25, Day 14 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Nagoya.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: In summer, accidents near the beach are a constant occurrence. But new technologies using smart devices are helping to prevent disaster in Japan.

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Yamagata / Minagawa Akira (designer) To make a "dantsu" carpet, everything from yarn-making to weaving is done by hand. Minagawa experiences the deep allure of handmade goods.

programme.title: KABUKI KOOL
programme.desc: This is a family tragedy during a civil war where two brothers fight on opposing sides, both brilliant strategists. The story takes place against the real historical background.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Documentary 360: ON THE EDGE
programme.desc: A look at the lives of residents in the last slum in Seoul, South Korea. As the deadline for eviction to make way for a redevelopment project looms, what choice will the village's inhabitants make?

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: HIMARI:a Rising Violin Virtuoso
programme.desc: Global attention turns to 14-year-old Japanese violinist Himari. Follow the young prodigy after her world debut as she performs with many of the world's finest orchestras.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: What bird would take on a fearful peregrine falcon, the fastest creature on earth? The Eurasian hobby employs a range of high-speed techniques to both capture prey and defend its nest and young.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Kamikochi is a beautiful mountainous region in Nagano Prefecture that's 1,500m above sea level. With a mirror-like pond and rime ice, see the frozen beauty of Kamikochi through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: u&i
programme.desc: This show for kids promotes a greater understanding for people with difficulties and helps develop empathy. With the help of two fairies, the main character thinks about what can be done to help.

programme.title: Viewpoint Science
programme.desc: The proactive science education program which encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A documentary series that focuses on first-class professionals from various fields.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min
programme.desc: Hop on from Narita, the air gateway to Japan. Flying above the active volcanoes, breathtaking window views await!

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: SAMURAI WISDOM
programme.desc: Clad in shining gold, Kinkakuji stands out even in Kyoto. What inspired the samurai who built this stunning temple?

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Kyle Card hikes along the 1000km trail following the Pacific Coast in northern Japanwhere he discovers local lifestyles, stunning nature, traces of the area's 2011 disaster, and resilient people.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE: Riverside Sawmill
programme.desc: Workers at a sawmill use the latest tools and their honed skills to prepare the building blocks of Edo life: long, narrow beams, bamboo stems and leftover wood stacked as high as buildings.

programme.title: Documentary360: A Century on Film
programme.desc: The final year of WWII. Germany and Japan are locked in their wars of attrition, and the Allied powers are driven to the brink. Humanity opens the gates of hell.

programme.title: J-FLICKS

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE

programme.title: NHK WORLD SELECTION
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-17.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Spaces under Japan's elevated train tracks are being used in a variety of ways, from restaurants to skate parks. Some towns are utilizing these spaces as part of their regional revitalization efforts.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Chibita is a friendly cat who lives at a souvenir shop near Chusonji Temple, a World Heritage Site. Popo lives at a horseback riding club with 20 horses! At a rose garden, we meet handsome Kikujiro.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: ANIME MANGA EXPLOSION
programme.desc: ANIME MANGA EXPLOSION features major Japanese anime and manga works that are highly recognized by international fans. Each episode explores the secrets of the works' popularity.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Among Mee's friends, there's a popular game where you sneak up and squeeze your friends' butts. When someone does it to Mee, Mee shivers and feels weird. Papa says "That's your Inner Alarm's alert."

programme.title: Design Ah neo: "Assemble" Special
programme.desc: Design is fun! Design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us. An "Assemble" special episode.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: From natural landscapes to historic architecture representing centuries of cultural development, Japan's World Heritage sites offer a wide range of glimpses into history and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Today: reporting to a superior that a coworker is ill. Tran Dinh Thang works at a construction firm in Kanagawa. In a roleplay challenge, he must report to a superior that a coworker has become ill.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Branches from trees culled to thin the forest, once of no value, are the ideal material for Ishibashi Tetsushi. Extracting the essential oils, he transforms them into forest fragrances and hand soaps.
